eventId.description: Unique identifier for the inventory created event

productId.description: Identifier for the product that gained available stock

availableQuantity.description: Quantity that is now available for fulfilment

locationId.description: Warehouse or source location reporting the new stock

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 time when the inventory was created

source.description: Originating component or system that published the event

correlationId.description: Optional correlation id that ties the event to an originating workflow
